message:
test: add 38-test proptest suite for swarm_scheduler (ft-3681t.3.2)

Property-based tests covering serde roundtrips for all public types
(SchedulerConfig, QueuePressure, AgentLoadSnapshot, WorkAssignment,
RebalanceMove, SchedulerDecision, ScaleEvent, SchedulerError,
SchedulerSnapshot), pressure computation invariants, circuit breaker
reset/inactive/manual-reset semantics, agent tracking roundtrips,
snapshot/restore consistency, sequence monotonicity, scale-up bounds
and cooldown enforcement, evaluate decision properties, error Display
coverage, history eviction bounds, and readonly evaluation consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
